SEARCH

Package user

package user
It contains everything related to the different users of the store. In this section the different type of users are developed: employee, manager, registered client and unregistered client, as well as the abstract class of user. The employees are also divided based on the type of permission they have: order, store or exchange permission.
Author:
Ana O.R., Sofía C.L. and Duna P.R.
  • Class
    Description
    Employee
    It implements the employee
    ExchangePermission
    It implements the permission that allows an employee to manage Exchanges
    Manager
    It implements the manager of the store
    OrderPermission
    It implements the permission that allows an employee to manage Orders
    Permission
    It defines the user types
    RegisteredClient
    It implements the registered client
    StorePermission
    It implements the store permission of the store
    UnregisteredClient
    It implements the unregistered client
    User
    It defines the user of the app
    UserType
    It defines the user types
